boundary: review-only: inventory names are QA evidence and are not approved dictionary data
selectionRules: Use inventory records for source-shape, CAS parsing, long-name, duplicate, and batch-boundary coverage.
Use synthetic stress cases for 6-9 pictogram layouts because real inventory data may not contain every GHS-count condition.
Use a synthetic over-limit case to keep third-label blocking behavior tested without implying real GHS has 19 pictograms.

syntheticStressCases.expectedLayout: Planner blocks output because it would need a third label.
